highlights.text: I wrote on Friday 4pm: “There is a small active Failed Breakdown right now…my general lean is ES can defend 6644 which sets up 6655, consolidate, then 6670, 6688+.” We saw saw exactly this Monday.
I wrote at the close yesterday: “My general lean is to defer to the trend.
On the chart, they leave behind a footprint when they do this, and that footprint is my core setup: The Failed Breakdown .

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into the Failed Breakdown we had late day Friday/Sunday that gave us the squeeze into this weeks high (this is important to know because it is what I call a delayed entry Failed Breakdown).

post_title: Massive FOMC Volatility To Go Nowhere For SPX. Are Bulls Safe? Sept 18 Plan
